tests.name: TestCLIFinalRollupReturnsAtLeastTenActionableFeatureDepthRecommendations
asserts: CLI final rollup emits schema ao.mission.final-rollup.v0.1
CLI final rollup includes at least 10 feature_depth_recommendations
final rollup keeps safe_to_execute, executes_work, approves_work, and provider_calls false

tests.name: TestFeatureDepthRecommendationsReturnAtLeastTenActionableTasks
asserts: builder-level final rollup recommendations remain at least 10 and actionable
